field.title: % A
field.formula:
IF sum([qual_priority_a]) > 0 AND SUM([qual]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([qual_priority_a]) / SUM([qual])
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([qual_priority_a_z1jf]) > 0 AND SUM([qual_4yhn]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([qual_priority_a_z1jf]) / SUM([qual_4yhn])
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: % B
field.formula:
IF sum([qual_priority_b]) > 0 AND SUM([qual]) > 0  THEN
    SUM([qual_priority_b]) / SUM([qual])
ELSE
    NULL
END

IF sum([qual_priority_b_k57y]) > 0 AND SUM([qual_4yhn]) > 0  THEN

field.title: % C
field.formula:

field.guid_formula:
IF sum([qual_priority_c_oihp]) > 0 AND SUM([qual_4yhn]) > 0  THEN

ELSE

field.title: is_visible
field.formula: IF(([broker_pipeline] = 1 OR [valid_pipeline] = 1) AND [phone] IS NOT NULL, TRUE, FALSE)
field.guid_formula: IF(([broker_pipeline_rghd] = 1 OR [valid_pipeline_b57l] = 1) AND [phone_6ltr] IS NOT NULL, TRUE, FALSE)

field.title: CRM
field.formula: IF(SUM([qual]) > 0, IF(SUM([meet]) / SUM([qual]) > 0, SUM([meet]) / SUM([qual]), NULL), NULL)
field.guid_formula: IF(SUM([qual_4yhn]) > 0, IF(SUM([meet_lo1u]) / SUM([qual_4yhn]) > 0, SUM([meet_lo1u]) / SUM([qual_4yhn]), NULL), NULL)
